_comment: KHONG CHINH SUA: TEP DUOC TAO BOI STACLOUD
name: OpenClaw
author: congdongamazon@gmail.com
description: Egg OpenClaw cho STACloud, chay OpenClaw Gateway trong Pterodactyl voi persistent state tai /home/container/.openclaw.
startup: mkdir -p /home/container/.openclaw /home/container/.openclaw/workspace /home/container/.openclaw/skills; export OPENCLAW_HOME=/home/container/.openclaw; export HOME=/home/container; EXTRA_ARGS="${OPENCLAW_ARGS}"; if [ "${OPENCLAW_VERBOSE}" = "true" ]; then EXTRA_ARGS="${EXTRA_ARGS} --verbose"; fi; if [ -n "${OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN}" ]; then EXTRA_ARGS="${EXTRA_ARGS} --token ${OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN}"; fi; openclaw gateway --allow-unconfigured --bind ${OPENCLAW_BIND} --port ${SERVER_PORT} ${EXTRA_ARGS}

variables.name: Gateway verbose
variables.description: Enable verbose gateway logs. true = verbose, false = normal.

variables.name: Gateway bind
variables.description: Listener bind mode for OpenClaw Gateway.

variables.name: Gateway token
variables.description: Token for clients connecting to the OpenClaw Gateway. Required when binding beyond loopback.

variables.name: Extra gateway args
variables.description: Additional arguments appended to openclaw gateway.
